records.question: Which mountains in Cameroon’s Cameroon line are at most 4070 meters tall and have sunset photos taken with a Panasonic camera lens?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT mountain.id FROM mountain
JOIN photos ON mountain.id = photos.mountain_id
JOIN camera_lens ON photos.camera_lens_id = camera_lens.id
WHERE mountain.range = 'Cameroon line' AND mountain.height <= 4070.0 AND mountain.country = 'Cameroon' AND photos.name = 'sunset' AND camera_lens.brand = 'Panasonic'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.id
FROM mountain AS m
INNER JOIN photos AS p ON m.id = p.mountain_id
INNER JOIN camera_lens AS cl ON p.camera_lens_id = cl.id
WHERE m.Height <= 4070
  AND m.Range = 'Cameroon line'
  AND m.Country = 'Cameroon'
  AND p.name LIKE '%sunset%'
  AND cl.brand = 'Panasonic'

WHERE mountain.range = 'Toubkal Atlas' AND mountain.prominence >= 450.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT id 
FROM mountain 
WHERE Range = 'Toubkal Atlas' AND Prominence >= 450.0

records.question: Which mountains named Mount Cameroon in the Cameroon line range and country Cameroon have a prominence of exactly 3931.0, a height of at most 4070.0, and photos of wolfs in black and white?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT mountain.id FROM mountain
JOIN photos ON mountain.id = photos.mountain_id
WHERE photos.color = 'Black/White' AND mountain.range = 'Cameroon line' AND mountain.name = 'Mount Cameroon' AND photos.name = 'wolfs' AND mountain.prominence = 3931.0 AND mountain.height <= 4070.0 AND mountain.country = 'Cameroon'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT mountain.id
FROM mountain
INNER JOIN photos ON mountain.id = photos.mountain_id
WHERE mountain.name = 'Mount Cameroon'
  AND mountain.Range = 'Cameroon line'
  AND mountain.Country = 'Cameroon'
  AND mountain.Prominence = 3931.0
  AND mountain.Height <= 4070.0
  AND photos.name LIKE '%Wolf%'
  AND photos.color = 'Black and White'

records.question: Which mountains named exactly Mount Cameroon have photos taken with Schneider Kreuznach lenses of at least 14.0mm focal length?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT mountain.id FROM mountain
JOIN photos ON mountain.id = photos.mountain_id
JOIN camera_lens ON photos.camera_lens_id = camera_lens.id
WHERE camera_lens.brand = 'Schneider Kreuznach' AND camera_lens.focal_length_mm >= 14.0 AND mountain.name = 'Mount Cameroon'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.id
FROM mountain AS T1
INNER JOIN photos AS T3 ON T1.id = T3.mountain_id
INNER JOIN camera_lens AS T2 ON T3.camera_lens_id = T2.id
WHERE T1.name = 'Mount Cameroon'
  AND T2.brand = 'Schneider Kreuznach'
  AND T2.focal_length_mm >= 14.0

records.question: Which mountains named Mount Cameroon, exactly 4070.0 meters high with a prominence of at least 3931.0, have black and white photos of wolfs taken with Schneider Kreuznach lenses of max aperture 2.0 and focal length at most 14.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT mountain.id FROM mountain
JOIN photos ON mountain.id = photos.mountain_id
JOIN camera_lens ON photos.camera_lens_id = camera_lens.id
WHERE photos.color = 'Black/White' AND camera_lens.brand = 'Schneider Kreuznach' AND mountain.prominence >= 3931.0 AND mountain.name = 'Mount Cameroon' AND mountain.height = 4070.0 AND camera_lens.max_aperture = 2.0 AND camera_lens.focal_length_mm <= 14.0 AND photos.name = 'wolfs'

records.question: Which mountains named Abune Yosef / Guliba Amba have a prominence of exactly 1909.0 and feature photos taken with Sigma camera lenses?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT mountain.id FROM mountain
JOIN photos ON mountain.id = photos.mountain_id
JOIN camera_lens ON photos.camera_lens_id = camera_lens.id
WHERE mountain.name = 'Abune Yosef / Guliba Amba' AND camera_lens.brand = 'Sigma' AND mountain.prominence = 1909.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.id
FROM mountain AS m
INNER JOIN photos AS p ON m.id = p.mountain_id
INNER JOIN camera_lens AS cl ON p.camera_lens_id = cl.id
WHERE m.name IN ('Abune Yosef', 'Guliba Amba')
  AND m.prominence = 1909.0
  AND cl.brand = 'Sigma'

records.question: Which mountains named Ighil Mgoun in Morocco’s Central High Atlas range have a prominence of 1904.0 and are associated with photos named cloud?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT mountain.id FROM mountain
JOIN photos ON mountain.id = photos.mountain_id
WHERE photos.name = 'cloud' AND mountain.name = 'Ighil Mgoun' AND mountain.country = 'Morocco' AND mountain.range = 'Central High Atlas' AND mountain.prominence = 1904.0

INNER JOIN photos AS p ON m.id = p.mountain_id
WHERE m.name = 'Ighil Mgoun'
  AND m.Range = 'Central High Atlas'
  AND m.Country = 'Morocco'

records.question: What mountains named Ighil Mgoun in Morocco’s Central High Atlas have a height at most 4068.0, prominence at least 1904.0, and photos exactly named the mountain with color exactly RBG?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT mountain.id FROM mountain
JOIN photos ON mountain.id = photos.mountain_id
WHERE photos.name = 'the mountain' AND mountain.range = 'Central High Atlas' AND photos.color = 'RBG' AND mountain.country = 'Morocco' AND mountain.prominence >= 1904.0 AND mountain.name = 'Ighil Mgoun' AND mountain.height <= 4068.0

INNER JOIN photos AS p ON m.id = p.mountain_id
WHERE m.name = 'Ighil Mgoun'

  AND m.Prominence >= 1904.0

  AND m.Country = 'Morocco'
